mxfile.agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

mxCell.value: Integration points across Journey 1 (Campaign Creation) and Journey 2 (Agent Flyer Scan)

Journey 1 flow
Dashboard → Campaign API → Geo / QR Services → Campaign DB

Journey 2 flow
Field App → Agent API → Geo / QR Services → Delivery Log DB → Audit Log

Integration Test Checkpoints

• Geofence 403 when GPS coords fall outside campaign boundary
• QR duplicate returns distinct error code from invalid QR
• Delivery entry NOT created if geofence or QR check fails
• Audit log written even on failed scans (observability)
• delivery_id in 200 response matches DB record
• Async audit does NOT block 200 response latency

Integration Test Checkpoints
• Geo validates boundary edge cases
• QR pool returns 409 on exhaustion
• DB rollback on partial validation failure
• Status = Draft only after ALL validations pass
• campaign_id in response matches DB record
